Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM

Book Appointment

Free Online Consultation

Take advantage of a free online consultation. Fill out the form from anywhere in Poland or abroad. Choose the procedure you are interested in (Deep Plane Facelift, upper eyelid correction, lower eyelid correction, ear correction, nosee correction) and attach photos according to the guidelines.

A surgeon will evaluate your submission for procedure eligibility and provide an estimated quote. This is the first step toward your transformation — with no obligations and without leaving your home!

Application Form

Photo information: Select the procedure you are interested in and upload the appropriate photos according to the guidelines. All photos are securely transmitted and used solely for medical consultation purposes.

Your first and last name

Provide your email address for us to contact you

Provide your phone number (optional)

Which procedure are you interested in

Which Specialist would you like to consult with:

Have you previously undergone any plastic surgery or aesthetic medicine procedures? *

Do you have any chronic diseases? *

Do you take any medications regularly? *

Required fields *

Post-procedure reviews from our Patients

Kinga

A very good and experienced doctor. Steady hand. He also has a great team. I recommend him if you don't want to worry about the outcome of surgery. The best for me.

Joanna

I had an ear correction procedure with the Doctor. The ears look beautiful after the procedure! Recovery is going smoothly, and the procedure itself was quick and problem-free. I recommend it.

Małgorzata

Immense knowledge, experience, competence — a patient needs nothing more. I sincerely recommend trusting and placing yourself in the hands of the Doctor and his Team of Specialists.

Xxx

The doctor is very approachable and straightforward. You can see his commitment and willingness to help. The reception staff is also very friendly.
